siteTitle: Pullen's Way | A Grounded Guide to Meaningful Places
tagline: An honest, place-first guide shaped by memory, route, and local character.
heroTitle: A quieter, more personal guide to the places worth slowing down for.
heroIntro: Built as a thoughtful companion for exploring roads, landmarks, stops, and stories with a little more texture than a standard travel page. Replace this with your dad's real introduction once it's ready, and the structure will hold.
announcement: Fresh structure, warmer design, and simple editing are now built in.
